title: ICAI Invites Online Applications for Executive Officer (Chartered Accountant) Positions
content:
# ICAI Invites Online Applications for Executive Officer (Chartered Accountant) Positions

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Executive Officer (Chartered Accountant) positions ke liye online applications invite kiye hain. This recruitment drive aims to bring in eligible Chartered Accountants, including freshers, to support the Institute's functions.

*   **Positions Offered:** Executive Officer (Chartered Accountant)
*   **Eligibility:** Candidates must be Chartered Accountants, with freshers also eligible to apply.
*   **Number of Vacancies:** Approximately 50 posts.
*   **Application Commencement Date:** The online application portal opened on July 18, 2026, at 10:00 AM.
*   **Application Deadline:** The last date to submit online applications is July 31, 2026, until 11:59 PM.
*   **Approximate Annual Salary:** For Executive Officers, the salary is approximately ₹15.68 lakh per annum, corresponding to Pay Level-10.

Interested candidates should visit the official ICAI website to go through the detailed advertisement and apply online.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/career-in-icai/)

*Published on: 17 July 2026*
